name: GetComponent Pattern
translation_strategy: GetComponent<T>() -> get_component(T). Generic type parameter becomes function argument.
notes: Most common Unity pattern. Appears in nearly every script.

name: Find GameObject by Name/Tag
translation_strategy: Direct method name conversion: Find->find, FindWithTag->find_with_tag, FindGameObjectsWithTag->find_game_objects_with_tag. Array becomes list.
notes: Unity docs warn these are slow — same applies to Python version.

name: Destroy GameObject
translation_strategy: Destroy() is a global function in Unity (inherited from Object). In Python it's a static method on GameObject.
notes: Delay parameter not yet implemented in simulator.

name: Input Axis Movement
python_pattern:
h = Input.get_axis('Horizontal')
v = Input.get_axis('Vertical')
self.transform.translate(Vector2(h, v) * speed * Time.delta_time)
translation_strategy: Input.GetAxis -> Input.get_axis, Time.deltaTime -> Time.delta_time, transform.Translate -> self.transform.translate
notes: Very common in player movement scripts.

name: Rigidbody Velocity-Based Movement
unity_pattern:
Rigidbody2D rb = GetComponent<Rigidbody2D>();
rb.velocity = new Vector2(speed, rb.velocity.y);
translation_strategy: Combine GetComponent pattern with property access. new Vector2() -> Vector2().

name: Collision Callback
translation_strategy: Method name: OnCollisionEnter2D -> on_collision_enter_2d. collision.gameObject -> collision.game_object. Destroy() -> GameObject.destroy().
notes: Collision2D.game_object gives the other object involved.

name: SerializeField for Inspector Values
unity_pattern:
[SerializeField] private float speed = 5f;
[SerializeField] private GameObject bulletPrefab;
python_pattern:
def __init__(self):
    super().__init__()
    self.speed: float = 5.0
    self.bullet_prefab: GameObject | None = None
translation_strategy: [SerializeField] private T name = val -> self.name: T = val in __init__. Remove private modifier. Convert camelCase to snake_case.
notes: No inspector in Python. Values are set directly in code or scene setup.

name: Basic Coroutine with WaitForSeconds
translation_strategy: IEnumerator method -> Python generator function. yield return new WaitForSeconds(t) -> yield WaitForSeconds(t). StartCoroutine() -> self.start_coroutine(). StopCoroutine() -> self.stop_coroutine().
notes: Coroutines now supported via Python generators. WaitForSeconds, WaitUntil, WaitWhile, WaitForEndOfFrame, WaitForFixedUpdate, nested coroutines all supported.
